author: Haroen Viaene
body:
* chore(deps): update dependency lodash to v4.17.19 [security] (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#785) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/9d5f19dd0b98bd4750f792c52901aada8792c855, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/785
 * docs: fix bellow typo in d.ts file comment (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#788) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/0ed484346dad0fe68a55d496292b4e32e9658990, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/788
 * fix(insideBoundingBox): prevent invalid parameter from throwing (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#787) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/990a4349e3b38ff3a636b8133d254c9c0e5d6d8f, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/787
 * fix(ts): use a dedicated key to determine client version (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#789) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/591b210fe43b610462628aa252f7d99c2b11241e, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/789
